Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Dedicates a portion of the state bridge system to Detective Stephen J. Mullen
Summary: Dedicates bridge number 1019119 on state route one hundred ten in the town of Babylon, county of Suffolk, to Detective Stephen J. Mullen.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state bridge system to Detective Stephen J. Mullen
